topStories.description: The complaint, filed by documentary researcher Joel Gilbert, centers on Brazilian national Amanda Raissa Barbosa, who entered the United States under a J-1 Exchange Visitor visa as an au pair.

dailyNews.title: Trump calls Asim Munir, Shehbaz Sharif ‘extraordinary men’ for hosting US-Iran talks; says they ‘continuously thank me’
dailyNews.description: US President Donald Trump on Sunday lauded Pakistan leaders, Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif and Field Marshal Asim Munir, for hosting US-Iran talks. Calling them ‘extraordinary men,’ Trump said that the two continuously thank him for stopping the India-Pakistan war last year

dailyNews.title: US 'Failed' To Win Iran's Trust, Says Chief Iranian Negotiator
dailyNews.description: Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf, the Iranian Parliament Speaker asserted that Iran pursues powerful diplomacy, alongside military force, for upholding the rights of the Iranian people.

dailyNews.title: Inconclusive US-Iran talks, Oil Prices, Inflation Data To Dictate Investors' Sentiment: An
dailyNews.description: Besides developments related to Middle East, crude oil prices would also dictate market trends in a holiday-shortened week ahead, analyst said.

dailyNews.title: US weather alert today: Storm warning for California as Sierra Nevada faces heavy snow, strong winds
dailyNews.description: The National Weather Service has issued a winter storm warning for parts of central California, cautioning that snow accumulations could reach up to 14 inches in some areas, accompanied by wind gusts of up to 45 mph.

dailyNews.title: FIFA rejects Iran’s request to relocate World Cup games amid US-Israel war
dailyNews.description: Mexican President Sheinbaum says FIFA will not relocate Iran's fixtures from US despite repeated requests.

dailyNews.title: Software engineer from Vizianagaram drowns in U.S. river on his birthday
dailyNews.description: Singireddy Sai Krishna, 29, a software engineer from Bobbili in Vizianagaram district, drowns in the Meramec river in Missouri while celebrating his birthday

dailyNews.title: Trump orders Hormuz blockade, warns Iran over nuclear standoff
dailyNews.description: In a post on Truth Social, Trump said: “Effective immediately, the United States Navy… will begin the process of BLOCKADING any and all Ships trying to enter, or leave, the Strait of Hormuz.” He added that the move aims to counter what he described as “world extortion” by Iran.

dailyNews.title: First life-size statue of Swami Vivekananda unveiled in Seattle, US - see pics
dailyNews.description: The life-size bronze statue has been installed at the bustling Westlake Square in downtown Seattle. Officials said this is the first such installation to be hosted by a city government anywhere in the US.

dailyNews.title: Middle East conflict: How will US Navy clear mines in Strait of Hormuz?
dailyNews.description: US Navy's guided-missile destroyers, the USS Frank E Peterson and USS Michael Murphy, have initiated maneuvers along this vital energy transit route.

dailyNews.description: Talks between Iran and the US expose deep divisions, prolonging uncertainty during a two-week ceasefire.

dailyNews.title: Who is running US foreign policy? Varsha Gandikota and Jeremy Scahill
dailyNews.description: Varsha Gandikota-Nellutla asks journalist Jeremy Scahill who will benefit from the US-Israel war on Iran.

dailyNews.title: Kannur dental college student death raises questions about casteism in campuses
dailyNews.description: Parents alleged that certain faculty members discriminated against Nithin Raj on caste lines and showed a skin tone bias; CPI(M), Congress, and student organisations cutting across political lines have condemned the incident and demanded a comprehensive enquiry

dailyNews.title: Conservative group launches $5M ad blitz pressuring Senate on voter ID as GOP eyes SAVE America Act push
dailyNews.description: Conservative nonprofit Restoration of America launches a $5M nationwide ad campaign urging senators to pass the SAVE America Act on voter ID rules.

dailyNews.title: ‘American Pie’ star Shannon Elizabeth traded Hollywood fame for saving rhinos in South Africa
dailyNews.description: Shannon Elizabeth, who rose to fame in "American Pie," moved to South Africa in 2016 to launch a conservation charity protecting endangered wildlife.

dailyNews.title: Identity theft losses surge 70% for older Americans
dailyNews.description: Identity theft losses among Americans 60 and older surged 70%, reaching $48.5 million according to the FBI's latest internet crime report.

dailyNews.title: NASA chief declares America 'absolutely back' in space race, says US will beat China to the moon
dailyNews.description: NASA says America is "absolutely back" in the space race, rushing to beat China to the moon and build a lunar base under Trump-era Artemis program.

dailyNews.title: Trump gets Dana White to add fight to UFC White House card after personal ask
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump asked Dana White to add Derrick Lewis to the UFC Freedom 250 White House event, leading to a new bout against Josh Hokit.

dailyNews.title: What Now? Vance Leaves Iran Talks Without a Deal.
dailyNews.description: The lack of a breakthrough after 21 hours of negotiations leaves the Trump administration facing several unpalatable options.

dailyNews.title: Trump’s War With Iran Has Weakened America
dailyNews.description: The president should at long last recognize the ineptitude of his impulsive, go-it-alone approach.

dailyNews.title: Trump says U.S. to blockade ships in Strait of Hormuz after failed peace talks
dailyNews.description: Vice President JD Vance told reporters that "we have not reached an agreement" following face-to-face talks with Iranian leaders and Pakistani negotiators.

dailyNews.title: CBS News poll finds few see U.S. goals being met in Iran yet
dailyNews.description: Gas prices put pressure on pocketbooks — and President Trump's ratings — as Iran war continues.

dailyNews.title: Rep. Mike Turner defends Trump's handling of Iran war
dailyNews.description: GOP Rep. Mike Turner of Ohio defended the president's handling of the Iran war, saying he is focused on preventing Iran from obtaining a nuclear weapon.

dailyNews.title: Warner says he'll "take a look" at Trump funding request for Iran war
dailyNews.description: Democratic Sen. Mark Warner of Virginia did not rule out voting for a supplemental funding request for the Iran war, saying "I'll take a look at anything," while adding that President Trump should have sought congressional authorization before the conflict.

dailyNews.title: Trump says U.S. will blockade Strait of Hormuz after Iran peace talks fail
dailyNews.description: Trump said the U.S. blockade will stop Iran from policing the strait and benefiting economically while the rest of the world suffers from its closure.

dailyNews.title: Trump's 250-foot 'triumphal arch' would loom over Potomac, new renderings show
dailyNews.description: Rep. Don Beyer said "President Trump is focused on a taxpayer-funded vanity project that would choke traffic, block our skyline, and tower over sacred ground."

dailyNews.title: Trump praises Palantir as stock has worst week in over a year and Iran conflict drags on
dailyNews.description: Palantir's Maven platform have reportedly been used in the U.S. military campaign in Iran.

dailyNews.title: U.S. oil slips below $100 as Trump demands reopening of Strait of Hormuz
dailyNews.description: U.S. President Donald Trump on Thursday warned Iran to "stop now" if it was charging tankers to transit the Strait of Hormuz.
